title: Arithmetic right-shift by constant > 32 bits gives wrong result

features.name: arithmetic right-shift with large shift constant on signed wire
features.description: Code should include a signed wire with an arithmetic right-shift operation using a constant shift amount greater than 32 bits, where the result differs from expected due to the tool mishandling large shift amounts
features.snippet:
wire signed [2:0] wire_4 = 3'b011;
assign out35 = wire_4 >>> 36'hffff_ffff_f;
